_comment: Bytes that specific frameworks mis-handle during path parsing/routing, letting a segment like 'admin' slip past an upstream ACL that normalized differently. position: 'prefix' = prepended to the target path; 'segment' = inserted as its own path segment.

frameworks.name: spring
frameworks.desc: Spring Boot / Tomcat path matching quirks
frameworks.note: 0x3B is literal ';' matrix-param injection, distinct from URL-encoded semicolon module
